footer.aboutDesc: Mariot is your trusted partner for premium kitchen equipment in the UAE and across the Gulf region.
footer.descLong: Based in Dubai, Sharjah and Abu Dhabi, UAE, We are the first restaurant and cafe supply e-store in the Middle East food service industry. Our quality products, competitive pricing, large stock, extensive range and capability to ship fast, make us the excellent choice to cater to your needs.

aboutSection.title: About Mariot Group
aboutSection.desc1: Marriott Kitchen Equipment is a leading supplier of high-quality commercial kitchen solutions based in the United Arab Emirates. Renowned for its innovation, superior craftsmanship, and exceptional customer service, Marriott is committed to providing cutting-edge kitchen equipment and systems that meet the ever-evolving needs of businesses in the hospitality, restaurant, and catering sectors.
aboutSection.desc2: Commitment to Quality At Marriott Kitchen Equipment, quality is at the forefront of everything we do. All of our products are sourced from trusted manufacturers and go through rigorous testing to ensure they meet international standards. Our partnerships with world-renowned brands allow us to offer cutting-edge technologies and products designed to withstand the daily demands of busy commercial kitchens.
aboutSection.desc3: Custom Solutions for Every Need Understanding that no two kitchens are the same, Marriott offers customized kitchen solutions tailored to meet the specific needs of each client. Whether it's designing a complete kitchen layout, recommending the best equipment for a particular space, or providing ongoing maintenance and support, Marriott works closely with clients to ensure their kitchen is fully equipped to handle high volumes and produce exceptional results.
aboutSection.freeShipping: Free shipping on all orders from UAE
aboutSection.safeShopping: We offer a safe shopping guarantee

todayOffers.title: TODAY OFFERS
todayOffers.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or resetting them to see more products.
todayOffers.rationalDesc: With over 40 years of expertise, Rational's deep industry knowledge is evident in the design and performance of its products. The company's flagship product, the SelfCookingCenter, revolutionized the cooking industry by integrating both steam and convection heat in a single unit, optimizing cooking processes and delivering consistent results. RATIONAL continues to set industry standards with innovative solutions that enhance efficiency, quality, and sustainability in professional kitchens worldwide.

brandsPage.title: Shop by Brand
brandsPage.desc1: Welcome to the "Shop by Brand" section of Mariot Store, where we offer an exclusive range of kitchen equipment from the best kitchen equipment suppliers in Dubai and the UAE. Our curated collection features top-tier brands renowned for their quality and reliability, ensuring you find the perfect tools to enhance your cooking experience. Whether you're a professional chef or a passionate home cook, our selection is designed to meet your culinary needs.
brandsPage.desc2: At Mariot Store, we understand that the right kitchen equipment can make all the difference in your culinary journey. That's why we've partnered with leading brands that are committed to innovation, performance, and customer satisfaction. By shopping by brand, you can easily navigate through our extensive offerings and discover the tools that best suit your preferences and cooking style.
brandsPage.desc3: We pride ourselves on providing exceptional customer service and fast shipping to ensure a seamless shopping experience. Our dedicated team is here to help you find the kitchen equipment that meets your aspirations. Explore our selection today and experience the quality and reliability that only the best kitchen equipment suppliers in Dubai and the UAE can provide. Your culinary adventure awaits at Mariot Store!
brandsPage.callout1: Mariot is offering "Shop by Brand" for the convenience of its customers. Click here to see all brands.
brandsPage.callout2: If you want to shop within a specific category, click on the category for brand-specific shopping.
brandsPage.freeShipping: Free shipping on all orders from UAE

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: The premier online platform for the restaurant industry, offering advanced heavy kitchen equipment, global shipping, and comprehensive training.
aboutPage.storyTitle: Dedicated to the Food & Hospitality Sector
aboutPage.storyLead: The Mariot Store is a premier online platform offering high-quality kitchen equipment and professional tools designed specifically for the rigorous demands of the modern restaurant industry.
aboutPage.storyText: Our goal is to provide customers with a convenient and reliable shopping experience globally. We understand the complex needs of the food sector and aim to meet them with unmatched efficiency. With a simple, highly secure purchasing mechanism, we ensure your business operations run smoothly from order to international delivery.
aboutPage.quote: We are relentlessly committed to developing strong, long-term partnerships with our clients, always striving for complete satisfaction.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsSubtitle: Mariot high quality kitchen equipment store
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara1: With years of experience behind us, we also fulfill the role of a heavy kitchen equipment training company. We not only provide you with high quality kitchen equipment and excellent support, but we also assist you in training your employees on how to handle the equipment.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara2: We understand the importance of providing proper training to employees to ensure the correct and efficient use of the equipment. Therefore, we offer specially designed training programs that cover safety procedures, proper equipment handling, basic and preventive maintenance, and best practices in using heavy kitchen equipment.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara3: The training is delivered by a team of highly experienced and skilled professionals in the field of kitchen equipment. They employ effective training methods to ensure comprehensive understanding and proper application of the information.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara4: Choosing us ensures that you not only get high quality kitchen equipment and excellent support but also comprehensive training for your team. We are here to assist you in developing your business and achieving success in the restaurant industry.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara5: With our wealth of experience and exceptional relationships, we have the unique ability to meet the requirements of clients worldwide. We provide high-quality kitchen equipment products and services, adhering to the highest standards of quality and reliability.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara6: Our distinctiveness lies in our capacity to provide you with advanced and efficient heavy kitchen equipment, coupled with outstanding technical support and after-sales services. We are committed to achieving customer satisfaction and fostering long-term relationships.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara7: Mariot Group carries genuine international credibility in the field of heavy kitchen equipment. We are here to deliver the quality and professionalism you deserve, working tirelessly to meet your expectations and ensure your satisfaction on a global level.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara8: Customer satisfaction is of utmost importance to us, and we go the extra mile to meet our client’s needs and expectations. We aim to build long-lasting relationships with our clients by consistently delivering reliable kitchen equipment and providing the necessary support throughout the year.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara9: We are always striving to develop strong, long-term partnerships with our clients and to achieve their complete satisfaction. Your trust in us is vital, and we promise to continue working diligently in the field of kitchen equipment to offer you the best solutions and services.
aboutPage.whyChooseUsPara10: At Mariot Group, we are dedicated to assisting you in achieving success in the restaurant industry and ensuring your utmost satisfaction.

shippingPage.title: Shipping Details
shippingPage.intro1: We offer delivery to all regions of the United Arab Emirates. To most of the main cities like Dubai, Abu-Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, Ras Al Khaimah, Ajman, and Um Al Quwain. We will deliver within 4-7 working days. If you need more details about the delivery times to other cities or remote areas, please contact us.
shippingPage.intro2: MARIOT GROUP will NOT deal or provide any services or products to any OFAC (Office of Foreign Assets Control) sanctions countries in accordance with the law of UAE.
shippingPage.trackingDesc: We will send you a tracking number that you can use to track the order online. Upon request, we will provide the mobile number of the representative who will be in charge of delivering the order to you.
shippingPage.damagedTitle: 2. In case of missing or damaged items
shippingPage.damagedDesc: Although great care is taken while packing, damage does occur occasionally during transit. To help us claim the damage and speed up the reimbursement process we require that you perform the following steps:
shippingPage.step1: Sign on the delivery receipt stating the delivery
shippingPage.step2: Please check the item in front of the courier by checking the contents of the package
shippingPage.step3: If the item has any damage whatsoever, please include the same note on the delivery comments and request an RTO (Return to Origin) within the first 7 days of delivery. Mariot-Group will not take responsibility for the damaged item(s) after this period.
shippingPage.step4: Always take photos of any damage
shippingPage.step5: Do not throw away any of the original inner or outer packaging
shippingPage.step6: Call customer service directly after discovering the problem. Please have your order number available so that we can assist you as quickly as possible
shippingPage.eidDesc: Due to the limited availability of shipping services, any orders that will be placed three days before the vacation, will be delivered three days after the vacation.
shippingPage.pricesDesc: Orders over AED 1,500 are shipped for free. Below is the price breakdown for orders below that:
shippingPage.cancelDesc: If you want to cancel your order, please contact customer service. However, items that have already been processed for shipping will be dealt with as a return. Please visit the Return page for more information.
shippingPage.contactDesc: We are here to ensure your shipping experience with Mariot Kitchen Equipment is seamless and hassle-free. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to our Customer Service team.
shippingPage.contactRequest: For any Shipping related request, you can contact us on:

returnPage.title: Returns & Replacements
returnPage.intro: We are committed to ensuring your satisfaction with Mariot Kitchen Equipment. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, we offer a convenient return and replacement policy within the GCC. Please review the following terms and conditions:
returnPage.eligibilityDesc: You may return or replace a product within 14 days from the date of delivery, provided it meets the following criteria:
returnPage.rule1: All regularly stocked items, except for consumable products, can be returned within 14 days of receipt.
returnPage.rule2: The item must be in unused condition and in its original packaging.
returnPage.rule3: If you do not have your purchase receipt, exchange will not be possible.
returnPage.rule4: Repairs of the products damaged due to wear & tear will be entertained at management discretion within 6 months of the purchase. Please note that the management has the right to assess the age & condition of the returned goods prior to offering a repair or exchange (Terms & Conditions Apply).
returnPage.rule5: Upon request, and at our discretion, we may exchange defective/faulty items for identical items of equivalent value.
returnPage.rule6: For your security & personal safety, CCTV cameras are in operation on these premises.
returnPage.rule7: The Management reserves the right to amend this policy without prior notice.
returnPage.rule8: You can return items that were originally part of the promotion, but you will lose the promotional discount. For example, if the item you are returning is part of a “50% off” deal, your refund will be adjusted against the retail per-piece rate of the products you choose to keep after the return.
returnPage.rule9: Credit/Debit card Payment: Note that your bank or card issuer can take 2-7 additional business days to process the transaction.
returnPage.rule10: Products purchased outside of stores at exhibitions and sale events will neither be exchanged nor refunded.
returnPage.rule11: Please note that we may not be able to exchange your product with the exact item(s) you purchased with us. Some of our products are exclusive to our online store or are available for a limited time only.
returnPage.rule12: If you wish to return your faulty or incorrectly supplied order for a refund or to exchange certain products, you must inform us within 7 days of receipt of your order, and return the relevant products in-store as soon as possible in the same condition as supplied, in their original packaging with a copy of the relevant receipt and a valid ID.
returnPage.rule13: If you have received an item(s) that is defective (e.g. delivered with ripped or missing parts, or other damage) it may be returned for a replacement or full credit upon approval.
returnPage.refundDesc: Depending on your original payment method:
returnPage.method1: If you paid by Credit/Debit card, we will process the refund by crediting your account within 7-14 working days.
returnPage.method2: If you chose Cash on Delivery, our Customer Service team will initiate a bank wire transfer to the individual who placed the order within 7-14 working days.
returnPage.method3: For orders paid via Bank Wire, a bank wire transfer will be arranged to the account of the person who placed the order within 7-14 working days.
returnPage.method4: Refunds will be done only through the Original Mode of Payment.
returnPage.condition1: The item must be in an unused condition.
returnPage.condition2: It must be returned in the original packaging.
returnPage.shippingItem1: Mariot Group offers free shipping for certain products within all emirates of UAE.
returnPage.shippingItem2: We provide shipping by our own vehicle.
returnPage.shippingItem3: For certain items, there may be shipping charges involved with a maximum of AED 150. Shipping charges are only for heavy-duty items.
returnPage.shippingItem4: Collection from our branches is free of cost.
returnPage.contactIntro: Before returning an item, please contact our Customer Service. This will help us create a return authorization for you.
returnPage.contactDesc: We are here to ensure your experience with Mariot Kitchen Equipment is seamless and hassle-free. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to our Customer Service team.
returnPage.contactRequest: For any Refund related request, you can contact us on:

paymentPage.title: Payment Information
paymentPage.cardDesc: You can pay by using your credit card through a 100% safe & secure online transaction. We at mariotstore.com are secure by using our tieup with checkout.com to ensure that every credit card transaction will be an impenetrable fortress.
paymentPage.bankDesc: You can pay us by doing a Bank Transfer to our bank account in:
paymentPage.bankNote: Note: You can pay us by doing a Bank Transfer to our bank account in.
paymentPage.tabbyDesc: Buy now, pay later! Split your purchases into 4 interest-free payments using Tabby. Simply choose Tabby during your checkout process. It's completely transparent with no hidden fees.

termsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
termsPage.intro: Welcome to www.mariotstore.com (“Site”). The owner and operator of the Site is Mariot Kitchen Equipment – LLC, a limited liability company registered in the United Arab Emirates (“UAE”) under license number 764928, with its office located at Salah Al Din St, Dubai in the UAE (“we”, “our” or “us”). These Terms of Use and all policies and additional terms (if applicable) posted on the Site set out the terms on which we offer you access to and use of our Site, services and applications including our mobile application (collectively, the “Services”). You can find all of our policies and additional terms here: www.mariotstore.com (“Legal Documents”). These Legal Documents are incorporated by reference into these Terms of Use. By accessing, registering and/or continuing to use or access our Services, you are agreeing to be bound by these Terms of Use and the Legal Documents with immediate effect. These Terms of Use and the Legal Documents are subject to change by us at any time. Your continued use of the Site following any such change constitutes your agreement to these Terms of Use and Legal Documents as so modified. References in these Terms of Use to “you” (or similar) are references to you as an individual or legal entity as the case may be.
termsPage.aboutTitle: ABOUT OUR SITE TERMS AND CONDITION
termsPage.aboutDesc: The Site is an e-commerce platform that allows enterprise users to offer and sell products, and individuals and enterprise entities to buy products. We reserve the right to introduce new Services and update or withdraw any of the Services, in our sole discretion, and we will not be liable to you for exercising this discretion.
termsPage.eligibilityDesc: You are eligible to register as a buyer or seller and benefit from the Services if you meet the following eligibility criteria:
termsPage.buyersList: i. you are above the legal age for purchasing products in your country of residence; and ii. you are able to provide an address in the UAE or the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (“KSA”) for delivery of products.
termsPage.sellersList: i. you are a legal entity duly registered in your jurisdiction; ii. you have a current trade licence; iii. you provide proof of authorisation for the individual who will be registering and using the Site; iv. you provide identification for the authorised person; v. you can provide supporting bank details; and vi. you acknowledge and agree that for certain product categories, additional requirements might be applicable.
termsPage.reg2: 2. In order to register to the Site, you will need to provide us with certain information. Your registration to the Site may not be accepted if you do not provide us with the required information. We reserve the right to decline any registration without further explanation. We reserve the right to undertake such checks as are necessary to verify your identity.
termsPage.reg3: 3. Once you have successfully completed registration, your registration shall continue for an indefinite period, subject to suspension or termination in accordance with clause 6 of these Terms of Use.

termsPage.obligations1List: a. are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of, and restricting access to and use of your account and password; b. agree to immediately notify us of any unauthorized use; c. will provide true, accurate, current, and complete information; d. will not disclose user’s information; e. will cooperate with our requests.
termsPage.obligations2: 2. When using or accessing the Services, you agree that you will not:

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Mariot Store, we take your privacy seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and handle your personal information.
privacyPage.collectionDesc: We collect information you provide directly to us when you register, place an order, or contact us. This includes your name, email, phone number, and delivery address.
privacyPage.usageDesc: We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, and send updates about our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyPage.securityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. Your payment information is processed through secure, encrypted gateways.
privacyPage.cookiesDesc: Our site uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and remember your preferences.
privacyPage.contactDesc: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please contact our support team.
